steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun in the blank refers back to Water in the North Atlantic Ocean. Although it describes a large amount of water, water is a singular, uncountable noun.

steps.title: Use a singular pronoun
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B are plural demonstrative pronouns. Choice C is a plural object pronoun. All three conflict with the singular antecedent water. A singular pronoun agrees and fits the sentence. The answer is D.
